response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack software engineering experience but lacks direct expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. His background is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded software, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and tooling development
Extensive experience in performance-critical systems and low-latency apps
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
No evidence of hardware-software co-design or system-on-chip performance analysis
